testcase.name: test_upload_clip

failure.message: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/tmp/test_clip.mp4'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:110: in test_upload_clip with open("/tmp/test_clip.mp4", "rb") as f: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/tmp/test_clip.mp4'

testcase.name: test_list_media
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:131: in test_list_media assert state["clip_id"] in ids ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'clip_id'

testcase.name: test_serve_file
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:134: in test_serve_file r = s.get(f"{API}/files/{state['clip_storage']}", timeout=60) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'clip_storage'

testcase.name: test_build_timeline_and_render
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:172: in test_build_timeline_and_render {"kind": "clip", "asset_id": state["clip_id"], "duration": 2.0, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'clip_id'

testcase.name: test_download_rendered_mp4
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:228: in test_download_rendered_mp4 match = next((m for m in r.json() if m["id"] == state["output_id"]), None) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/backend_test.py:228: in <genexpr> match = next((m for m in r.json() if m["id"] == state["output_id"]), None) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'output_id'

testcase.name: test_list_renders
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:259: in test_list_renders assert state["job_id"] in ids ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'job_id'

testcase.name: test_delete_media
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:267: in test_delete_media r = s.delete(f"{API}/media/{state['clip_id']}", timeout=30) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'clip_id'

testcase.name: test_search_contemplative_filters
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_retrieval.py:105: in test_search_contemplative_filters assert c["width"] > 0 and c["height"] > 0 E assert (0 > 0)
